redistribution.basis: Project-generated synthetic source fixture; no Roland output is included.

expectedObservation: Determine converter acceptance for a canonical short PCM16 44.1 kHz WAV.
actualObservation: OBSERVATION: The official converter rejected a 100-frame mono PCM16 44.1 kHz WAV because the sample must be longer than 100 ms.
notes: Evidence state remains OBSERVED until cases immediately below and above 100 ms are tested.
The exact user-interface message was not captured verbatim and must be recorded during the threshold matrix.
